phase_name: Phase 13 closeout → Phase 14 discussion (not yet started)

Applied all 10 fixes as 11 atomic commits with regression tests
Full workspace validation: cargo test (225 passed), clippy -D warnings, cargo fmt --check
Documented deferred CR-03 design flaw for Phase 14
Marked Phase 13 complete in STATE.md, pushed 31 commits to origin/develop

remaining_tasks.name: Run /gsd-discuss-phase 14 to gather requirements/goals for Phase 14 (Observability + Hermes Support)

decisions.decision: CR-03 (per-phase lock rescoping) is correct but incomplete — deferred the deeper fix (per-phase state files, phase-threaded monitor advance, coarse lock for main-checkout git ops) to Phase 14 rather than reopening Phase 13
decisions.rationale: Phase 13 was already verified/shipped; the flaw is a design gap in parallel-safety, not a regression in the MVP core loop itself. Full writeup + acceptance criteria in .planning/phases/13-mvp-core-loop/13-DEFERRED-CR-03.md

decisions.decision: Used cargo fmt after the fix commits rather than hand-formatting
decisions.rationale: Kept diffs minimal and consistent with repo style; committed separately as a chore commit for clean history

decisions.decision: For each of the 10 review findings, verified fail→pass against the OLD code before committing the fix (not just that new tests pass)
decisions.rationale: User's global feedback/preference for rigor — confirmed at least one fix (sequentagent_fails_when_agent_a_crashes_without_result) actually failed on pre-fix main.rs via git stash

uncommitted_files: .gitignore (pre-existing modification from before this session — not touched)
next_action: Run /gsd-discuss-phase 14 to begin requirements/goals discussion for Phase 14 (Observability + Hermes Support). Phase 14 CONTEXT.md already exists at .planning/phases/14-observability-hermes/CONTEXT.md with prior scoping (14a observability, 14b capture_agent_output sync-path decision, 14c-e Hermes adapter/skill/plugin) — read it first, then also read 13-DEFERRED-CR-03.md since that work is now folded into this phase.
context_notes: This session did TWO things in sequence: (1) executed /gsd-code-review 13 --fix, which ran the standard reviewer+fixer agents and produced 13-REVIEW.md / 13-REVIEW-FIX.md (15 findings fixed); (2) the user then asked for an independent, deeper /code-review (skill, not gsd-code-review) of those 15 fix commits specifically, run at high effort with 8 parallel finder angles + verification — this caught real regressions the first pass introduced (a startup race in WR-11's reorder, a TOCTOU in CR-03's lock, a rate-limit misclassification in CR-02, plus several incomplete fixes). All 10 survived-verification findings were fixed with tests, verified fail-vs-old-code where practical, and pushed. Phase 13 is now genuinely done — verified, reviewed, re-reviewed, fixed, and closed out in STATE.md/ROADMAP.md. Next step is purely forward motion into Phase 14 discussion; there is no unfinished Phase 13 work.
